marketMood: Cautious recovery: Micron's blowout earnings lift semis after Tuesday's $1.3T AI-capex-fear selloff, but PCE data and lingering KOSPI fragility keep risk appetite in check.

upcomingEvents.event: US May PCE Inflation + Q1 GDP Final Estimate (BEA, 8:30 a.m. ET)
Darden Restaurants Q4 FY2026 Earnings (DRI, pre-market)

topStories.headline: Micron Smashes Q3 Estimates: $41.5B Revenue, EPS of $25.11 vs $20.20 Expected
topStories.summary: Micron reported fiscal Q3 2026 revenue of $41.46B (vs $23.86B prior quarter) and non-GAAP EPS of $25.11 — a 24% beat vs street consensus — confirming AI HBM memory demand is structural and supply is still sold out.
topStories.marketImpact: MU ↑ strongly after hours; HBM/DRAM memory suppliers broadly ↑; NVDA, AMD watch for AI memory read-through; AVGO faces more scrutiny on its lighter AI guidance

topStories.headline: Nasdaq Recovers as Semis Bounce After Tuesday's Broadcom-Triggered $1.3T Wipeout
topStories.summary: Tuesday's Nasdaq -2.2% and Philadelphia Semiconductor Index -8% rout — sparked by Broadcom's Q3 AI chip guidance miss ($16B vs $17.2B expected) and fears about hyperscaler AI capex sustainability — partially recovered Wednesday, with the S&P 500 down just 0.10%.
topStories.marketImpact: Semis broadly ↑ on Wednesday recovery; AVGO ↓ watch; sector re-rating underway on AI capex sustainability fears

topStories.headline: PCE Inflation and Q1 GDP Final Estimate Drop at 8:30 a.m. ET Today
topStories.summary: The BEA releases May PCE price index (core ~3.3% expected) and final Q1 2026 GDP estimate today; the Fed held rates at 3.50%–3.75% in June and raised its year-end PCE forecast to 3.6%, with BofA flagging a September hike as credible.
topStories.marketImpact: Bonds watch — hotter PCE pushes 10Y yield ↑; softer print supports risk assets ↑; USD ↑ or ↓ on surprise; rate-sensitive sectors (real estate, utilities) most exposed

topStories.headline: Oil Hits Pre-War Lows at $73.74 as US-Iran MoU Holds, but Trump Threatens Fresh Strikes
topStories.summary: Brent crude settled at $73.74/bbl — its lowest since before US-Israel airstrikes on Iran in late February — as a 60-day US-Iran peace roadmap brokered by Qatar and Pakistan takes effect, with Iranian crude sales now licensed in USD, though Trump's public threats maintain uncertainty.
topStories.marketImpact: Oil majors ↓ on lower prices; airlines, industrials ↑ on fuel cost relief; USO ↓; Middle East geopolitical risk watch

topStories.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) Tumbles 16% from Post-IPO Highs, Former Nasdaq Chief Warns Not Trading on Fundamentals
topStories.summary: SpaceX, which IPO'd at $135 on June 12 and hit $225, has fallen 16.4% since Monday as broader tech selling and rising rate concerns hammer the newly listed high-multiple stock; SpaceX also confirmed a new bond issuance and a Colossus 2 data centre deal with AI startup Reflection AI.
topStories.marketImpact: SPCX ↓ watch; new bond issuance adds leverage concern; sentiment gauge for AI-adjacent IPOs broadly

topStories.headline: South Korea's KOSPI Triggers Circuit Breaker with 8% Intraday Crash; Samsung and SK Hynix Bloodbath
topStories.summary: KOSPI crashed 8%+ on Tuesday, triggering a circuit breaker at Korea Exchange, after three simultaneous hits: MSCI again excluded South Korea from Developed Markets, regulators flagged leveraged single-stock ETFs on Samsung/Hynix, and AI stock forced liquidations amplified the selloff. KOSPI recovered ~4% on Wednesday.
topStories.marketImpact: EWY ↓; Samsung ↓; SK Hynix ↓; KOSPI stabilising but fragile; $2.5B foreign capital fled in the session

topStories.headline: Darden Restaurants Q4 FY2026 Results This Morning — 22% EPS Growth Expected
topStories.summary: Darden reports Q4 FY2026 results today with consensus at $3.64 EPS on $3.73B revenue — implying ~22% YoY EPS growth — driven by strong same-store sales at Olive Garden and LongHorn Steakhouse despite ongoing beef commodity inflation.
topStories.marketImpact: DRI ↑ watch on beat; restaurant sector (CMG, CAKE) read-through; options pricing ~5.5% post-earnings swing

companiesToWatch.name: Broadcom

priorPickMoves.move: Micron's $25.11 EPS blowout beat aligns with Serenity's HBM/NAND memory chokepoint thesis; MU had hit a record $1,051 before Tuesday's selloff dragged it -13%, but the earnings beat provides a fundamental foundation
Under pressure in the broader semiconductor selloff despite being upstream of the AI photonics build-out; Serenity's original May 27 call now tested by macro headwinds
InP substrate thesis intact — Micron's beat on HBM memory supports continued AI infrastructure build-out demand

serenity.sentiment: No specific new posts from June 24–25 found via web search. Self-reported YTD returns of +3,612% to +4,502% (unaudited, per Lookonchain) have attracted significant community attention. Current semi selloff generating debate on whether AI capex has peaked — Micron's blowout counters the bear case. Pushback on unaudited and leveraged returns persists. Check directly: https://x.com/aleabitoreddit or https://semiconstocks.com

tickerDescriptions.MU: Micron Technology, leading US DRAM and HBM (high-bandwidth memory) manufacturer central to AI GPU infrastructure
tickerDescriptions.NVDA: Nvidia Corporation, dominant designer of AI GPUs and data centre accelerators
tickerDescriptions.AVGO: Broadcom Inc., diversified semiconductor and software company with a major custom AI ASIC business for hyperscalers
tickerDescriptions.AMD: Advanced Micro Devices, designer of CPUs and AI accelerators competing with Nvidia in data centres
tickerDescriptions.MRVL: Marvell Technology Group, networking and custom AI ASIC semiconductor company
tickerDescriptions.INTC: Intel Corporation, US semiconductor manufacturer of CPUs and foundry services
tickerDescriptions.SOXX: iShares Semiconductor ETF tracking the ICE Semiconductor Index of US-listed chip companies
tickerDescriptions.TLT: iShares 20+ Year Treasury Bond ETF, tracks long-duration US government bonds
tickerDescriptions.SPY: SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust, tracks the S&P 500 index of 500 large US companies
tickerDescriptions.QQQ: Invesco QQQ Trust, tracks the Nasdaq-100 index of the 100 largest non-financial Nasdaq companies
tickerDescriptions.UUP: Invesco DB US Dollar Index Bullish Fund, tracks the US dollar against a basket of major currencies
tickerDescriptions.USO: United States Oil Fund, tracks the price of West Texas Intermediate crude oil futures
tickerDescriptions.XOM: Exxon Mobil Corporation, the largest US integrated oil and gas major
tickerDescriptions.CVX: Chevron Corporation, major US integrated oil and gas company
tickerDescriptions.HAL: Halliburton Company, leading oilfield services and equipment provider
tickerDescriptions.DAL: Delta Air Lines, one of the largest US commercial airline operators
tickerDescriptions.UAL: United Airlines Holdings, major US commercial airline operator
tickerDescriptions.SPCX: SpaceX, Elon Musk's rocket launch and Starlink satellite internet company, recently IPO'd in June 2026
tickerDescriptions.EWY: iShares MSCI South Korea ETF, tracks South Korean equities including Samsung and SK Hynix
tickerDescriptions.DRI: Darden Restaurants, operator of Olive Garden, LongHorn Steakhouse, and other casual dining brands
tickerDescriptions.CMG: Chipotle Mexican Grill, fast-casual Mexican restaurant chain with strong same-store sales growth
